channel.title: latex on Jan de Muijnck-Hughes
channel.description: Recent content in latex on Jan de Muijnck-Hughes

item.title: Colour Blind Aware Semantic Highlighting
item.description: Yesterday, I gave a talk about my work at SPLS Nov ‘16 at the University of Strathclyde. In my work I have a data type: data Session : (ty : Ty) -> (old : Context) -> (new : ty -> Context) -> Type where and a function that computes an instance of that type with information to popular the value old. Session : List Role -> List (Role, Role) -> Type Session rs ps = Model.
